message:
feat(rate-limit): add operational telemetry counters to RateLimitTracker [ft-3kxe.11]

Add RateLimitTelemetry/RateLimitTelemetrySnapshot structs with 6 plain u64
counters (events_recorded, panes_evicted_lru, panes_removed, gc_runs,
gc_panes_collected, events_pruned). Increment counters in record_at(),
remove_pane(), and gc_at(). Add telemetry() accessor. Write 10 proptest
counter invariant tests plus standalone proptest_rate_limit_telemetry suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
